issue_title: Custom share button only allows 1 class
issue_body_preview:
Thanks for developing this - it is really helpful.  I found an issue that is not a show-stopper, but I would like to correct:

There does not appear to be a way to pass in more than 1 class into a custom share button. For example here is a custom method I've written:


  getTwitterButton(): Sha
test_description_zh: 创建一个自定义分享按钮，为其配置多个 CSS 类（例如 'class-a class-b'），将该自定义分享按钮渲染到页面上，检查按钮元素是否同时应用了所有指定的 CSS 类。
expected_result_zh: 自定义分享按钮的 DOM 元素上应同时包含所有配置的多个 CSS 类，而不是仅保留一个类或将多个类名合并为一个字符串。按钮的样式应正确反映所有类的叠加效果。
